meaning: n.[气]风向标,风环,风信旗,变化不定的事物,(风车、螺旋桨等的)翼,叶片
examples: How did this weather vane of the US economy become a car crash of a corporation?
Granny took the time to explain the function of her weather vane, hanging on the wall, which predicted the upcoming weather.
Good morning. Vane Theater, at your service.
Vane's research led drug companies to target pain by stopping the COX enzyme from producing prostaglandins.
The colors of the winning owner's silks are painted on the jockey and horse weather vane atop the infield cupola.
